data.title: Ethereum faces outage over Pectra upgrade on Sepolia testnet
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Ethereum's Pectra upgrade on the Sepolia test network is facing an interruption. An unknown attacker took advantage of the zero token transfer situation to mine empty blocks. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: BTC falls below 82,000 USDT
data.description: OKX market data shows that BTC fell below 82,000 USDT and is now at 81,996.6 USDT, a 24-hour drop of 3.94%. (This newsletter is generated with the assistance of AI)

data.title: Over 90 million USD was liquidated in the past 4 hours
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Coinglass data shows that in the past 4 hours, the entire network has been liquidated for $93.541 million, of which long orders have been liquidated for $37.0166 million and short orders have been liquidated for $56.5244 million.

data.title: Market News: Singapore Exchange to List Open Bitcoin Futures Contracts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to market news, the Singapore Exchange will list open Bitcoin futures contracts. (Jinshi)

data.title: Market News: Japan's cryptocurrency reform bill will be submitted to the Diet after cabinet approval
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to market news, Japan's cryptocurrency reform bill will be submitted to the National Assembly after the cabinet's approval. (Jinshi)

data.title: Gate.io pre-market OTC trading is now available for Zora(ZORA)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Gate.io pre-market OTC trading has officially launched Zora (ZORA) at 18:00 (UTC+8) on March 10, 2025.

data.title: Bitget will launch Bubblemaps (BMT) in the Innovation Zone and Web3 Zone
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Bitget will launch Bubblemaps (BMT) in the Innovation Zone and Web3 Zone, and the trading will start at 20:00 on March 11, 2025.

data.title: Data: SBI VC Trade, a crypto exchange under SBI, increased its holdings by 4,000 BTC
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to @kyle_chasse, SBI VC Trade, a crypto exchange under Japanese financial giant SBI Group, increased its holdings by 4,000 BTC, worth US$330 million.

data.title: Henlo trading is now available in Gate.io Innovation Zone
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Gate.io Innovation Zone now supports the Berachain public chain and will launch Henlo trading for the first time at 17:00 (UTC+8) on March 10.

data.title: Bitget has launched U-based AUDIO perpetual contracts with leverage ranging from 1 to 25 times
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the official announcement, Bitget announced that it has launched the U-based AUDIO perpetual contract with a maximum leverage of 25 times. Contract trading BOT will be opened simultaneously.
